anomaly_label: Anomaly detected on one signal — under review
morphology_baseline_note: Within this segment's historical seasonal range for this month.
source_citation: Order of the National Green Tribunal regarding illegal sand mining in Madhya Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh and Rajasthan
hedge_language: This card documents a satellite-derived anomaly, not a confirmed finding. Anomalies require independent human verification before being treated as evidence of illegal activity.
